question_text: Which of the following is an advantage of an electromagnet compared to a permanent magnet?

options.label: A
options.text: It can be switched on and off

options.label: D
options.text: It is stronger than any permanent magnet

explanation: Electromagnets can be switched on and off by turning the current on and off, whereas permanent magnets are always magnetic. This makes electromagnets useful for applications like electric bells and cranes.
